description: Primary-runtime compound profiles whose contraindications_or_flags field was reviewed and intentionally remains empty because reliable human evidence does not establish a specific contraindication for the exact compound or formulation.

exceptions.reason: Human safety evidence concerns curcuminoid mixtures or turmeric products, not isolated bisdemethoxycurcumin.
Human safety evidence concerns curcuminoid mixtures or turmeric products, not isolated demethoxycurcumin.
Human trials concern whole Bacopa extracts; isolated bacopaside II contraindications cannot be inferred.
Human trials report short-term tolerability but do not establish a categorical contraindication.
Dose- and susceptibility-dependent precautions are supported, but the systematic review does not establish a universal disease-specific contraindication.
Safety depends on caffeine dose and individual susceptibility; combination-specific contraindication evidence is insufficient.
Short-term trials did not establish a categorical contraindication; pregnancy, breastfeeding, and long-term evidence remain insufficient.
Reviews support dose-dependent precautions but not a categorical contraindication for this formulation.

Reviews support dose-dependent precautions but not a categorical contraindication for this formulation.
Systematic reviews do not establish kidney disease or another condition as a categorical contraindication; evidence in pre-existing renal disease remains limited.
Component trials do not establish a categorical contraindication for the unspecified combination.
Most renal safety evidence concerns creatine monohydrate; hydrochloride-form contraindications cannot be inferred.
Systematic reviews do not establish a categorical renal contraindication, while evidence in pre-existing renal disease remains limited.
This is not a defined formulation distinct from L-theanine; short-term trials do not establish a categorical contraindication.
Reviewed adverse effects and evidence limits support precautions but not a universal categorical contraindication.
